storage.sla: P95 < 30s for scan; P95 < 10m for variants

jobs.purpose: Orchestrator dispatched immediately after FileUploaded. Fans out to ScanFileForVirusesJob + GenerateFileVariantsJob (batched). Also updates FileKindRegistry usage stats + records the upload against `storage.uploads.month` entitlement.

Runs the file kind's variant recipes (thumbnail, medium, hero, etc). Each recipe produces one FileVariant row. Retries on transient image-processor errors. Skips variants that already exist (idempotent). Fires FileVariantGenerated per successful variant + FileVariantsCompleted when all done.

Runs the configured AV driver (clamav / s3-antivirus / null) against the file byte stream. On clean: sets virus_scan_state=clean, fires FileScanned. On infected: moves the file to quarantine disk, sets virus_scan_state=infected, fires FileVirusFound. On scan_failed after retry exhaustion: sets virus_scan_state=scan_failed + fires FileScanned with outcome=scan_failed (admin dashboard surfaces for manual review).

Nightly sweep of soft-deleted + archived files past their retention window. For each: hard-delete the row + decrement blob refcount (physical byte removal happens when refcount hits 0 on the last-referring delete). Batched at 500 rows per run to keep DB pressure low. Emits FileErased with erasure_reason=retention_purge.

Nightly sweep of aborted / expired ChunkedUploads past a 7-day retention. Hard-deletes the row + cleans up any leftover multipart parts on the driver side (S3 abortMultipartUpload). Releases any lingering quota reservation.

Weekly sweep. Reconciles the ContentAddressableStore refcount ledger against the actual File row count per sha256. Corrects drift (e.g. refcount says 3 but only 2 File rows exist, so the blob is a candidate for deletion after the last-referrer hard-delete). Emits STORAGE_DEDUP_DRIFT_FOUND metric per finding.

Hourly sweep. Marks every SignedUrlAudit row where expires_at < NOW() AND revoked_at IS NULL as revoked (revoked_reason=expired_by_sweep). Emits SignedUrlRevoked per row. Batched at 5000 rows per run.

Hourly reconciliation. Per tenant: SUM(size_bytes) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL + archived_at IS NULL, compare against the recorded `storage.bytes.consumed` entitlement usage, correct drift. Also refreshes the storage.files.max_per_tenant slot count. Emits StorageQuotaApproaching if the reconciled ratio crosses the 80% threshold (idempotent).
